question: Scenario: Selling to someone who wants more money/luck?
text: Guys, who wants to be rich in 2024? 💸 Look at Scrooge! He is literally bathing in Gold Coins! Put this on your work desk to attract money. It is not just a toy; it is your new Lucky Charm for wealth!

question: Scenario: How to sell the 'Flocking' (Fuzzy) texture?
text: I wish you could reach through the screen and touch this! 🧸 It is NOT cold plastic. It is fully flocked and fuzzy! The peanut shell feels so soft, like a cozy blanket. You will not stop touching it!

question: Scenario: Selling to 'Girly' girls or pink lovers?
text: Calling all my coquette girls! 🎀 Look at this pearlescent finish. It glows like a pearl necklace in the light. It gives such a romantic, dreamy vibe. Perfect for your vanity or a cute gift for your girlfriend!

question: Scenario: Hype up the Secret (Steamboat Willie)?
text: STOP SCROLLING! This is the Legend. The 1/144 Secret! 🤫 It has a real wind-up key. You turn it, and the boat actually moves! Silver and black vintage style. If you pull this today, you are the Main Character!

question: Scenario: Introducing the Classic Mickey style?
text: Let's take it back to the classics! 🎬 Check out this translucent road sign. It looks like clear jelly! It’s that OG Disney magic mixed with Dimoo’s cool style. If you love the original Mickey, you need this one.

question: Scenario: Convincing a customer about 'Good Value'?
text: Let's do some quick math! 🧮 In this one box, you don't get one... you get THREE ducks! Huey, Dewey, and Louie! It is the best value in the whole set. You get so much detail for the same price!

question: Scenario: Showing off the '2 Ways to Display' feature?
text: This one is so funny! 😂 You can stand him up, OR lay him down like he slipped on a banana peel! 🍌 It captures Goofy’s clumsy personality perfectly. It’s like getting two poses in one figure!

question: Scenario: Selling to someone who needs energy?
text: Look at that wink! 😉 Donald is putting on a show. The microphone is removable too! If your desk feels boring, this singing Donald brings instant happy energy. He is just a mood booster!

question: Scenario: Selling the elegant/fancy details?
text: This is for the classy collectors. ✨ Look at the laser effect on her bow! It changes color when I move it. It’s not just pink; it’s like a rainbow. Simple, elegant, and super high quality.
